title: 贝莱德第二季度吸引近2000亿美元资金净流入 总资产首次突破15万亿
content: 贝莱德第二季度吸引客户净流入1920亿美元，投资者将资金投入交易所交易基金，推动该公司总资产首次突破15万亿美元。贝莱德周三在声明中表示，投资者向主动管理基金净投入530亿美元，营收同比增长31%，至71亿美元。首席执行官Larry Fink在声明中表示：“市场基本面强劲且支撑良好，新技术推动利润率上升和盈利动能增强。”他补充称，贝莱德对自身增长的信心促使其将2026年计划股票回购规模提高至20亿美元。贝莱德称，今年上半年客户净流入达到创纪录的3210亿美元。长期投资基金净流入1990亿美元，超过分析师平均预估的1700亿美元。

title: 入伏首日上海用电负荷创历史新高
content: 7月15日15时39分，上海电网最高用电负荷达4221.6万千瓦，较去年最高值4215.9万千瓦增加5.7万千瓦，创历史新高。空调降温负荷集中释放成为拉动电网负荷攀升的首要推手，据测算空调降温负荷约占全市总负荷的44%。这已是今年第5个高温日，也是本周以来用电负荷第二次突破4000万千瓦关口。 (上观新闻)

title: 给「一人全干」做了一套 Skill，优化了 Grok 4.5 的短板，让中阶模型也能发挥威力
content: A developer created "Solo Ship," a skill framework that automates end-to-end software development from product design to implementation. It addresses weaknesses in mid-tier models like Grok 4.5, such as long-task execution, complex architecture understanding, and user experience, allowing them to compete with more powerful models. Users only need to input tasks and review stage outputs. The implement skill component can also handle small tasks using lightweight models like Claude Sonnet 5. The project is available on GitHub with installation scripts.
eventKey: 给「一人全干」做了一套-skill-优化了-grok-的短板-让中阶模型也能发挥威力

title: 等了两年，国行苹果AI终于通过备案，接入千问
content: China's cyberspace regulator approved seven on-device generative AI services from Apple, Huawei, OPPO, vivo, Xiaomi, Samsung, and Nubia. Apple's China-specific "Apple Intelligence" will integrate Alibaba's Qwen model after a two-year wait since its June 2024 WWDC debut. A brief March leak revealed fast but imprecise local processing with privacy benefits but accuracy gaps versus cloud-based competitors. Apple's delayed entry contributed to iPhone sales struggles in China, where rivals already offer AI features. The overseas version uses Google's Gemini, while China's runs on different technology with no confirmed launch timeline.
eventKey: 等了两年-国行苹果ai终于通过备案-接入千问
normalizedTitle: 等了两年 国行苹果ai终于通过备案 接入千问

title: 分享一个小工具： AiRoute — 本地 AI 路由转发网关
content: AiRoute is a free, open-source local AI routing gateway that simplifies API management for developers. Running on localhost:3000, it lets users switch between multiple model providers through a single interface without reconfiguring clients. Key features include one-click model switching, intelligent routing with auto mode, automatic fallback for failures, and native dual-protocol support for Anthropic and OpenAI formats. The tool comes as a single executable for easy setup.
eventKey: 分享一个小工具-airoute-路由转发网关
normalizedTitle: 分享一个小工具 airoute — 本地 ai 路由转发网关

title: From the Archive: Can Anyone Catch NVIDIA? | The Future of Chips and Infrastructure
content: A panel discussion on AI infrastructure explores the economics of AI hardware, GPUs, custom silicon, data centers, and global compute competition. Examines NVIDIA's advantages, custom chips from Google, Amazon, and Meta, frontier AI model economics, infrastructure constraints, export controls, robotics, and enterprise software. Argues that copying NVIDIA is insufficient for building a winning AI hardware company.
source: The a16z Show - content+a16zpodcast@a16z.com (Erik Torenberg, Erin Price-Wright, Guido Appenzeller, Dylan Patel)

title: 优衣库再失一枚棋子
content: Christophe Lemaire and Sarah-Linh Tran may exit Uniqlo's Uniqlo U line after 2026, ending a decade-long partnership. Fast Retailing has reduced its stake in Lemaire's namesake brand, which grew tenfold to over €100 million during the collaboration. The U series served as Uniqlo's "design laboratory," with successful innovations filtering into mainline products. Its potential departure coincides with Uniqlo's strategic pivot toward Western markets, where Lemaire's modern European aesthetic was particularly valuable. Clare Waight Keller's Uniqlo:C series and her promotion to creative director suggest Uniqlo has prepared for this transition.
eventKey: 优衣库再失一枚棋子
normalizedTitle: 优衣库再失一枚棋子

title: 安踏品牌CEO徐阳离职，激进的零售实验结束了｜独家
content: ANTA brand CEO Xu Yang steps down due to family reasons, with co-CEO Lai Shixian taking over. Xu, the first marketing-background leader in the role, joined in 2006 and previously grew Arc'teryx China from 800 million to nearly 3 billion yuan. Since becoming ANTA brand CEO in 2023, Xu pursued aggressive retail experiments including multiple new store formats and online-offline segmentation, but failed to meet 10-15% annual growth targets—revenue growth dropped to 3.7% in 2025. New ventures like SV, Super ANTA, and ARENA & PALACE struggled with low efficiency and profitability. The departure signals a return to ANTA's efficiency-focused, core channel strategy.

title: 看看你被 grok 上传了什么
content:
The material documents a forensic investigation plan for Grok Build CLI to determine if user code is automatically uploaded to Google Cloud Storage (GCS) or storage proxies. The investigator must:

- Discover environment paths (GROK_HOME, binary location, version)
- Analyze binary strings for upload-related mechanisms (GCS, upload_queue, trace_upload, ZDR/privacy)
- Parse historical logs to extract all upload events with timestamps, session IDs, repository paths, sizes, and reasons
- Attempt content recovery through archive capture or size-based fingerprinting
- Deliver a verifiable Chinese report distinguishing GCS repository state uploads from model API context

Deliverables include: report.md, env.json, upload_events.jsonl, summary.json, archive_inventory (or missing documentation), and commands.sh for reproducibility.

All conclusions must trace to evidence; inferences must be labeled. No modifications to production code, no leakage of private code, and no hardcoded assumptions about paths or
eventKey: 看看你被-grok-上传了什么
normalizedTitle: 看看你被 grok 上传了什么

title: GPT-5.6 Sol一夜变笨，思考预算960砍到128，没智力固定的模型了？
content: OpenAI's GPT-5.6 Sol MAX appeared to degrade in performance when users noticed degraded reasoning depth. A Japanese team observed the model dropping from overdelivering to barely meeting expectations. Community investigation revealed an internal parameter called "juice value" — the reasoning compute budget — had been silently reduced from 960 to 128, an 87% cut. OpenAI's Tibo Sottiaux denied "nerfing," explaining they ran experiments to investigate unexpected usage spikes after expanding context windows. He admitted adjusting "juice values" but claimed they were reverted. The incident highlights transparency gaps: AI platforms control performance sliders users cannot see, undermining expectations of consistent model capability.
eventKey: gpt-5-sol一夜变笨-思考预算960砍到128-没智力固定的模型了
normalizedTitle: gpt-5 6 sol一夜变笨 思考预算960砍到128 没智力固定的模型了

title: DeepSeek传筹备IPO，中国AI头部公司融资狂飙
content: DeepSeek is preparing for a domestic IPO targeting a 2027 listing and seeking a new funding round at a pre-money valuation of at least 480 billion yuan (~$71 billion). China's AI listing rules effectively create a pathway for the company. Founder Liang Wenfeng maintains nearly 100% voting control through a limited partnership structure, which poses governance challenges for public markets. Meanwhile, rivals Zhipu and Kimi are also aggressively fundraising, and ByteDance plans $28 billion in 2026 AI infrastructure spending. The sector is engaged in an expensive arms race toward AGI, where falling behind risks irrelevance.

content: DeepSeek has begun preliminary discussions with new investors for another funding round at a $71 billion pre-money valuation. The Chinese AI firm completed its first external financing in late May, raising about $7 billion (including roughly $3 billion from founder Liang Wenfeng) at a $52 billion post-money valuation. The rapid follow-up round aims to fund large-scale data center construction and AI chip purchases.

title: 长鑫科技：发行价格为 8.66 元 / 股，7 月 16 日进行网上和网下申购
content: Changxin Technology announced its IPO on the Shanghai STAR Market at 8.66 yuan per share, with online and offline subscription on July 16, 2026. The initial offering of 6.688 billion shares represents about 10% of post-IPO total shares. China International Capital Corporation was granted an over-allotment option of up to 15%. The price corresponds to a diluted P/E ratio of 308.92x based on 2025 earnings, exceeding industry averages. Gross proceeds are estimated at approximately 57.92 billion yuan, with net proceeds of about 57.64 billion yuan.

He stated that New Oriental has no non-compete agreements except for core sensitive positions, viewing post-employment competition as normal given China's large market. He dismissed rumors of personal downfall as jokes.

title: 16岁创业，17岁发paper：当大厂从高中开始“抢人”
content: AI companies are recruiting talent directly from high school. ByteDance offers top students annual salaries up to 6 million yuan, while Tencent and Geely have launched programs for teenagers as young as 13. A 17-year-old Shenzhen student recently co-authored a paper by Moonshot AI's Kimi team that Elon Musk praised. Some high schoolers are skipping college entirely to join tech firms or start AI companies, with one 17-year-old Shanghai student securing $500,000 in funding. Investors have created funds targeting founders born after 1998, valuing young entrepreneurs' AI-native skills and long-term potential over traditional experience. The trend reflects intense industry anxiety about keeping pace with rapidly advancing technology.

title: 这，才是下一个10年最稀缺的能力
content: AI is reshaping business through three levels: accelerating R&D, optimizing operations, and transforming decision-making itself. As AI generates infinite strategies cheaply, human judgment in defining problems, selecting options, and bearing responsibility becomes scarcer. Leading companies now adopt hybrid human-AI decision architectures, assigning AI rule-based, high-frequency decisions while reserving ethical, strategic choices for humans. CEOs must evolve from decision-makers to decision architects designing who decides, with what boundaries, and how accountability flows.
